rules: No generic sans-serifs for headings. Chivo provides a stark, structural tech feel.
Passwords, credit balances, and hex codes MUST use IBM Plex Mono.
Overlines must always be used above major section headers to establish structure.
Use 'Grid Borders' pattern: Expose the structural skeleton of the app. Containers should use border-collapse style with 1px border-zinc-800.
Containers with borders MUST have generous internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
Never center-align forms or dense data. Always left-align for maximum scanning efficiency.
Mobile constraints: Images and data visualizations max 80vh height.

surfaces_and_materials.headers: Crystal Glass: bg-zinc-950/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-800
surfaces_and_materials.cards: Terminal Look: bg-[#0f0f12] border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg. Hover state: border-emerald-500/30 shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(16,185,129,0.05)] transition-all duration-300.
surfaces_and_materials.password_display: Retro-Futurism: bg-black border border-emerald-500/50 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(16,185,129,0.1)] text-emerald-500 text-center font-mono py-6 rounded-md.

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-500 text-black font-bold rounded-md hover:bg-emerald-600 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors hover:text-emerald-400

hero_background.description: Tech nodes subtle glowing green network topology. Use as main landing page background with bg-black/80 overlay.

security_visual.description: 3D glowing green padlock digital cubes. Use for the 'Security Features' or 'Hero' visual on the marketing page.

vault_texture.description: Dark abstract metallic server vault. Use as background for Pricing page or Credit Dashboard.

abstract_digital.description: Abstract green digital pattern with vertical lines. Use for 'History' or 'Batch Generation' section background with heavy dark overlay.

components.marketing: Pure HTML/Tailwind for bento grids and hero layouts to maintain strict structural control.
components.app_dashboard: Shadcn UI heavily customized to match the 'Terminal/Swiss' aesthetic.
components.inputs: Shadcn Input, modified to have bg-black border-zinc-800 focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500.
components.tables: Shadcn Table for Password History and Credit History. Remove rounded corners, use straight lines. Header bg should be zinc-900.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must explicitly declare hover states. Examples: hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-emerald-400.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use transition-colors duration-200 for buttons/links. Use transition-all duration-300 ease-out for cards.
interactions_and_motion.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure hover text meets 4.5:1 contrast.

testing_attributes.rule: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
testing_attributes.convention: kebab-case, role-based. Examples: data-testid='generate-password-button', data-testid='credit-balance-display', data-testid='login-submit-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Replace index.css variables with the dark mode palette defined in these guidelines. Set global background to #09090b.
2. Ensure Tailwind config is updated with the custom fonts: Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, and IBM Plex Mono.
3. Build the marketing/pricing page using the 'hero_background' with a heavy overlay (bg-black/70). Use bento grids for features.
4. For the Password Generation tool, use a high-contrast terminal-like display for the generated password. It must be the focal point.
5. For the pricing table, use the 'Grid Borders' layout pattern. Highlight the $30/200cr package with a border-emerald-500.
6. Integrate Shadcn components (Dialog, Input, Button, Table, Tabs) but strip Vercel-like soft styling. Use sharp corners (rounded-md max) and high contrast borders.
7. Add data-testid to EVERY button, form input, and essential text element (like generated password output or credit amounts).
